title: Business in a Box
subtitle: Create your own branded data and airtime store. Set your prices and start earning today.

store.title: Store Configuration
store.subtitle: Set up your branded storefront. This is what your customers will see.
store.storeUrlHint: Your store URL is automatically generated from your store name.
store.logoHint: Upload an image (max 1MB, we'll resize to 1024×1024px for you!)
store.fileRequirements: Max 1MB · Any image size accepted - we'll auto-resize to 1024×1024px
store.autoGeneratedHint: This will be used if you don't upload your own logo.
store.uploadHint: Upload an image or one will be generated for you
store.androidAppHint: Get a branded APK in 3–5 business days

review.title: Review & Submit
review.subtitle: Please review your information before submitting.
review.agreement: By submitting, you agree to the Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Acceptable Use Policy.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.storeNameMin: Store name must be at least 2 characters
